pages.title: Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the MARX-ZH-CN digital library project: its mission, scope, multilingual collections, hosting infrastructure, and how the major sections relate to each other. Links to all child pages for deeper detail.

pages.title: Mission and Scope
pages.purpose: Explains the project's purpose as a free, web-accessible digital archive of Marxist-Leninist and Hegelian classics in German, Chinese, English, and Russian. Covers the site's domain names (19491007.xyz, marx-zh-cn.github.io), the AGPLv3 license, usage restrictions, and the disclaimer about text accuracy versus original printed editions.

pages.title: Deployment and Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Documents the CI/CD pipeline: the GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/d.yml) that deploys to Cloudflare Workers on every push to main, required secrets (CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID), and the wrangler CLI. Also covers the epub sub-repository's own workflow and the _redirects file in docs/MEW/.

pages.title: Site Architecture and Shared Frontend
pages.purpose: Overview of the static-site architecture: how HTML files, CSS stylesheets, and the shared mlr.js script work together to deliver a consistent reading experience across all collections. Links to child pages covering the JavaScript runtime and the CSS design system.

pages.title: mlr.js — Shared JavaScript Runtime
pages.purpose: Deep dive into docs/mlr.js (and the identical copy at en/mlr.js and ru/mlr.js): the ?rd reading-progress feature (localStorage scroll persistence), automatic propagation of the ?rd query parameter to all internal links, responsive table wrapping, and image width clamping. Explains the ALLOWED_PATHS regex list that gates which pages participate in progress tracking.

pages.title: CSS Design System
pages.purpose: Covers the family of stylesheets used across the site: mewde.css (MEW German reader), styles.css (Chinese collections), hegel.css (Hegel works), vil.css (Russian Lenin), works.css and MECW.css (English MECW), firstpages.css (landing pages), artikel.css, inhalt.css, leitseit.css, format.css, mew42.css. Documents shared conventions: dark-mode support, seitenzahlen class, blockquote/zitat sizing, TOC/volc layout classes, and the color palette (#DC3545 red headings, #2D3A53 body text, #EEF0F5 background).

pages.title: Navigation and Pagination System
pages.purpose: Explains the cross-document navigation conventions used in every HTML article: the seitenzahlen div for bibliographic provenance, inline page-break anchors (id='S[N]'), sequential article links (ME01-028.html → ME01-033.html → …), volume index pages (index.html per volume), and the chronological index (MEW/default.html). Covers the ?rd parameter propagation that preserves reading progress across page transitions.

pages.title: Marx-Engels Works (MEW) — German Edition
pages.purpose: Overview of the German-language Marx-Engels Werke collection hosted under MEW/ (mlwerke.de source, Bände 1–26, 40, 42) and docs/MEW-ZENO/ (Zeno.org source, long works). Introduces the two sub-sources, the volume structure, and links to child pages covering content and HTML document format.

pages.title: MEW Volume Structure and Content
pages.purpose: Documents the 42 volumes of MEW available in the repository (Bände 1–26, 40, 42), their date ranges, and notable works. Covers the two German sub-collections: MEW/ (mlwerke.de, includes letters) and docs/MEW-ZENO/ (Zeno.org, preferred for long works). Describes the chronological index (MEW/default.html) and the economics index (ME-zuoek.html). Notes the supplementary files: ME-ak*.html (Appendix volumes 42–95), ME-iaa*.html (IAA documents), ME-nrz*.html (Neue Rheinische Zeitung), ME-fb.html.

pages.title: MEW HTML Document Format
pages.purpose: Technical reference for the HTML format used in every MEW article file. Covers: UTF-8 encoding and viewport meta tags; the seitenzahlen div with bibliographic citation; heading hierarchy (h2=author, h1=title, h3/h4/h5/h6=article identifier); inline page-break anchors (id='S[N]'); blockquote for quoted sources; the i tag for emphasis and foreign phrases; pipe-delimited inline translations (e.g. 'voix toujours tonnante |stets donnernde Stimme|'); the fn/fnt footnote classes; and the mewde.css + mlr.js dependencies.

pages.title: MEW Band 10 and Higher Volumes
pages.purpose: Covers the structure and content of MEW volumes 10 and above (Bände 10–26, 40, 42) as represented in the MEW/10/ through MEW/42/ directories. Notes the same HTML conventions as Band 1 but applied to later works including Das Kapital (Bände 23–25), Theorien über den Mehrwert (Band 26), and the supplementary volumes.

pages.title: Chinese-Language Collections
pages.purpose: Overview of the three Chinese-language collections hosted under docs/: MEW-ZH (Marx-Engels Collected Works 1st Chinese ed., 50 vols), MEA (Marx-Engels Anthology, new translations, 10 vols), and LENIN (Lenin Collected Works 2nd Chinese ed., 60 vols). Links to child pages for each collection.

pages.title: MEW-ZH — Marx-Engels Collected Works (Chinese, 1st Edition)
pages.purpose: Documents docs/MEW-ZH/: the 50-volume Chinese first edition of the Marx-Engels Collected Works (马克思恩格斯全集第一版), translated by the CPC Central Compilation and Translation Bureau. Covers volume numbering (vols 1–50, with vols 46–49 partially formatted), the parallel structure to MEW German volumes, the MEAW Selected Works index files (MEAW-1.html–4.html), and the HTML format (styles.css, mlr.js, ?rd reading progress).

pages.title: MEA — Marx-Engels Anthology (New Chinese Translations)
pages.purpose: Documents docs/MEA/: the 10-volume Marx-Engels Anthology (马克思恩格斯文集) with newer translations. Covers the volume structure (vols 1–10, with vols 6–8 partially formatted), the relationship to MEW-ZH, and the EPUB download (MEA.epub in the epub/ directory).

pages.title: LENIN — Lenin Collected Works (Chinese, 2nd Edition)
pages.purpose: Documents docs/LENIN/: the 60-volume Chinese second edition of Lenin's Collected Works (列宁全集第二版). Covers the volume mapping to the Russian 5th edition (vols 1–27 parallel; vols 28–43 → Russian 30–45; vols 44–53 → Russian 46–55; vols 54–55 → Russian 28–29; vols 56–60 unique to Chinese edition), formatting status (vols 8, 13–28 bold/emphasis not yet marked; vols 44–60 incomplete), the Lenin Selected Works index (ls-1.html–4.html), and the EPUB download (LENIN.epub).

pages.title: English Collection — Marx & Engels Collected Works (MECW)
pages.purpose: Overview and technical reference for the English-language collection under en/MECW/: the 50-volume Marx & Engels Collected Works published by Progress Publishers, Lawrence & Wishart, and International Publishers (1975–2004). Covers the volume structure (vols 1–27 political/philosophical/historical writings; vols 28–37 political economy drafts; vols 38–50 correspondence), the MECW.css stylesheet, the en/index.html landing page, the en/archive/ (Eleanor Marx and other archive material), and en/history/international/.

pages.title: MECW Volume Index and HTML Format
pages.purpose: Details the file naming convention (MECW[VV]-[NNN].html), the MECW.css stylesheet, the MECW1-index.html volume index, and the works.css used on the en/ landing page. Explains how the English files differ from the German MEW files: no seitenzahlen div, different heading conventions, image files (MECW[VV]-img[NNN].png/gif/jpg) embedded in volumes.
pages.parent: English Collection — Marx & Engels Collected Works (MECW)

pages.title: Archive and History Sections
pages.purpose: Documents en/archive/ (3,378 files: marx/ subdirectory with additional Marx writings, eleanor-marx/ with one file) and en/history/international/ (74 files covering international labour history). Explains how these sections complement the main MECW volumes.
pages.parent: English Collection — Marx & Engels Collected Works (MECW)

pages.title: Russian Collection — Lenin Complete Works (5th Edition)
pages.purpose: Overview of the Russian-language Lenin collection under ru/: the 5th Russian edition of Lenin's Complete Works (Полное собрание сочинений, 55 vols). Covers the two sub-collections (VIL-FB2 from LitRes FB2 files, vols 1–42; VIL-UAIO from uaio.ru HTML, all 55 vols), the vil.css stylesheet, the ru/index.html landing page, and the ?rd reading progress feature.

pages.title: VIL-FB2 — FB2-Derived HTML Volumes
pages.purpose: Documents ru/VIL-FB2/: 42 volumes derived from LitRes FB2 files (prepared by Светлана Тимакова), covering Lenin's works from 1893 to approximately 1921. Explains the FB2-to-HTML conversion process, the volume directory structure (1/–42/), and the index.html per volume. Notes that this sub-collection is preferred for major works due to better formatting.
pages.parent: Russian Collection — Lenin Complete Works (5th Edition)

pages.title: VIL-UAIO — uaio.ru HTML Volumes
pages.purpose: Documents ru/VIL-UAIO/: all 55 volumes derived from uaio.ru HTML (prepared by Василию Грозину), including late works, letters, notebooks, and annotations not available in VIL-FB2. Covers the volume directory structure (1/–55/ plus pic/), the caution against using book_file to read volume content files, and the pic/ subdirectory with 89 portrait images.
pages.parent: Russian Collection — Lenin Complete Works (5th Edition)

pages.title: Hegel Works Collection
pages.purpose: Overview of the Hegel collection under docs/HEGEL/: German Suhrkamp Werke (vols 3, 5–10, 18–20) and English translations (Phenomenology by Pinkard, Science of Logic by Miller, Shorter Logic by Brinkmann & Dahlstrom). Links to child pages for German and English sub-collections.

pages.title: Hegel German Werke (Suhrkamp Edition)
pages.purpose: Documents docs/HEGEL/1/–20/: the German Suhrkamp Werke in zwanzig Bänden digitized by Talpa-Verlag and sourced from Zeno.org. Covers the volume-to-directory mapping (vol 3 = Phänomenologie; vols 5–6 = Wissenschaft der Logik; vol 7 = Rechtsphilosophie; vols 8–10 = Enzyklopädie; vols 18–20 = Geschichte der Philosophie), the hegel.css stylesheet, and the HGPS/HGSL/HEPL English translation sub-directories.

pages.title: Hegel Chinese and English Translations
pages.purpose: Documents the Chinese translations under docs/HEGEL/: shorter-logic/ (He Lin's Shorter Logic and Phenomenology), SCIENCE-OF-LOGIC-I/ and II/ (Yang Yizhi's Science of Logic), philosophy-of-right/ (Fan Yang/Zhang Qitai's Philosophy of Right), and the Lectures on the History of Philosophy (He Lin/Wang Taiqing). Also covers the English translations: HGPS/ (Pinkard Phenomenology), HGSL/ (Miller Science of Logic), HEPL/ (Brinkmann & Dahlstrom Shorter Logic), and the Images/ directory.

pages.title: Drawer Agent — AI-Assisted Research Tool
pages.purpose: Overview of the drawer/ directory: a Python command-line AI agent for searching and translating texts in the local library. Introduces the two agent variants (drawer_agent.py with translation, drawer_agent_simple.py without) and links to child pages for configuration and skills.

pages.title: Agent Architecture and Configuration
pages.purpose: Documents drawer/agent_config.py (Config class): API_KEY, API_URL, MODEL selection from MODELS list, MAX_TOKENS, TEMPERATURE, TOP_P, MAX_CONCURRENT, TIMEOUT, MAX_HITS, TRANS_CHUNK_CHARS, MAX_TOOL_RESULT_CHARS, HTML_FOLDER path, HISTORY_OUTPUT_PATH, ZH_DIRS/DE_DIRS/EN_DIRS/RU_DIRS language-to-directory mappings, SPECIAL_DIRS for per-collection skill files. Covers the ChatClient class (httpx-based LLM wrapper with retry, semaphore concurrency, thinking-mode support) and the command-line argument overrides (--model, --api-url, --api-key, --max-context-token, etc.).

pages.title: Agent Skills and Prompts
pages.purpose: Documents the drawer/skills/ directory: SYSTEM.md (master system prompt defining the three-step search/read/answer workflow), LIB_MAP.md and LIB_MAPB.md (library path-to-language mapping injected into the system prompt), READ.md (deep reading mode instructions), TRANS.md and TRANS_TEXT.md (HTML translation prompts), THINK.md (thinking mode guidance), MEW.md/MEW_ZENO.md/MEW_ZH.md/MECW.md/MEA.md/VIL_FB2.md/VIL_UAIO.md (per-collection volume indexes), IMPORTANT_WORK_ME.md/IMPORTANT_WORK_VL.md (notable works lists), SYS_SIMP.md (simplified system prompt for drawer_agent_simple.py). Covers the tool functions: grep_files, read_file_html, book_index, add_quote.

pages.title: Translation Workflow
pages.purpose: Documents the AI-assisted translation pipeline in drawer_agent.py: the useapitrans.py and useapitranslongtext.py scripts for translating individual HTML files and long texts respectively. Covers the TRANS.md prompt rules (preserve HTML tags, translate only visible text, handle footnotes, use CPC standard proper-noun translations), the TRANS_CHUNK_CHARS chunking strategy for long documents, and the output format.

pages.title: EPUB Packages
pages.purpose: Documents the epub/ directory: MEW.epub (German MEW collection), Lenin.epub (Chinese Lenin collection), MEA.epub (Chinese Marx-Engels Anthology), and the epub/.github/workflows/ CI pipeline for building/publishing EPUBs. Explains that EPUBs are compressed archives of the site's HTML pages, recommended for bulk download of the collection.

pages.title: EPUB Contents and Download
pages.purpose: Details the three EPUB files: MEW.epub (German MEW HTML pages), LENIN.epub (Chinese Lenin Collected Works HTML pages), MEA.epub (Chinese Marx-Engels Anthology HTML pages). Explains the relationship between EPUB content and the live website pages, the recommendation to download EPUBs for bulk access, and the caveat that EPUB content is for reference only and should be verified against original printed editions.

pages.title: 经典著作全集卷目对照表
pages.description: 马克思恩格斯全集（中文版/德文版/英文版）、列宁全集（中文版/俄文版）、黑格尔全集（二十卷本）、MEGA²第二部分卷目逐卷对照

rows.MECW: 1835-1843 Early writings of Marx, including doctoral dissertation The Difference Between the Democritean and Epicurean Philosophy of Nature
rows.MEGA²第二部分: Ökonomische Manuskripte 1857/58 (Grundrisse der Kritik der politischen Ökonomie)

rows.MECW: 1843-1844 Early writings of both, including the Economic and Philosophic Manuscripts of 1844
1844-1845 The Holy Family, The Condition of the Working Class in England
1845-1847 The German Ideology, Theses on Feuerbach
rows.MEGA²第二部分: Das Kapital Kritik der Politischen Ökonomie, Erster Band Hamburg 1867

rows.MECW: 1845-1848 The Communist Manifesto, The Poverty of Philosophy, Principles of Communism
1849-1851 The Class Struggles in France 1848–1850, The Peasant War in Germany
rows.黑格尔全集（二十卷本）: Enzyklopädie der philosophischen Wissenschaften im Grundrisse
rows.MEGA²第二部分: Das Kapital Kritik der Politischen Ökonomie, Erster Band Hamburg 1890

rows.MECW: 1851-1853 The Eighteenth Brumaire of Louis Napoleon, Revolution and Counter-Revolution in Germany
1853-1854 Newspaper articles concerning global politics and other writings, including The Civil War in the United States
rows.黑格尔全集（二十卷本）: Vorlesungen über die Philosophie der Geschichte

rows.MEGA²第二部分: Das Kapital. Kritik der politischen Ökonomie, Zweiter Band
Das Kapital Kritik der politischen Ökonomie, Dritter Band

rows.黑格尔全集（二十卷本）: Vorlesungen über die Philosophie der Religion
Vorlesungen über die Geschichte der Philosophie

rows.MECW: 1864-1868 Articles and writings concerning the First International, Value, Price and Profit (V. 20)
1874-1883 Critique of the Gotha Program, Socialism: Utopian and Scientific

rows.MEW: Theorien über den Mehrwert, Teil 1 bis 3
rows.MECW: 1882-1889 Origin of the Family, Ludwig Feuerbach and the End of Classical German Philosophy
1857-1861 Grundrisse, A Contribution to the Critique of Political Economy
1857-1861 Grundrisse, A Contribution to the Critique of Political Economy
1861-1863 Theories of Surplus Value, Volume I
1861-1863 Theories of Surplus Value, Volume II
1861-1863 Theories of Surplus Value, Volume III

rows.MEW: Karl Marx: Schriften und Briefe, November 1837 bis August 1844
Karl Marx: Ökonomisches Manuskript 1861 bis 1863 / Teil I
Karl Marx: Ökonomisches Manuskript 1861 bis 1863 / Teil II

rows.马恩全集中文第一版: （马克思1861-1863年《政治经济学批判》手稿I-V、XIX、XX本）
（马克思1861-1863年《政治经济学批判》手稿XVI、XVII、XXI-XXIII本）

rows.列宁全集中文第二版: （1888年—1913年，《俄国资本主义的发展》一书准备材料）
（1913年10月—1913年12月，马克思恩格斯通讯集批注）
